title: Skibidi Toilet Roll
description: The winter season is coming and Skibidi Toilet needs help to find all missing sweets! So help Skibidi to find all the missing Christmas sweets! enjoy this fantastic game in a Christmas atmosphere. Spin Skididi, avoid obstacles and dangers and travel through three different worlds to recover all the missing sweets. Enjoy this great puzzle cool game!
instructions: Click on left to move left Click on right to move right Key Left to move left Key Right to move right
